policies.policy: Report an explicit upstream delta or sham visible by the propagation event; abstain on later surface, outcome, causal sufficiency, repair utility, and unobserved alternatives.

Compare the complete trace with the successful witness, report every observed divergent locus and propagation edge, preserve dual causes, and use matched original/repaired/sham outcomes for but-for and collateral judgments.
Use full trace plus endpoint answer; deterministic calibration behavior anchors the attributed root at the surfaced failing check whenever the endpoint fails.
